caption: A presentation slide for EuroPython 2018 is displayed against a background featuring a cityscape with a prominent dome-shaped building under a blue sky. The top of the slide contains the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". The central part of the slide features the title "Industrial Machine Learning Pipelines with Python & Airflow" and the presenter's name, "Alejandro Saucedo". As the sequence progresses, the main title and presenter's name disappear to reveal a row of sponsor logos. These logos include "Smarkets", "EuroPython Society", "intel Software", "Microsoft", and "python". A second row of smaller logos appears below, including "CAMBRIDGE SPARK", "nexmo", "ONTRUCK", "numberly", "yelp", and "DATADOG". The lower portion of the screen is bordered by a green decorative pattern. The transition is a clean wipe from the presentation title to the list of sponsors.
